ia.label: 02 — ai in practice
ia.title: how i amplify my work with ai

items.title: planning & learning
items.desc: structured 27 days of badge preparation in partnership with claude — methodology, templates and tracking. the agent organized, i executed and wrote.

items.title: analysis & pipeline
items.desc: i use llms to iterate on sql queries, review pyspark code and document architecture decisions — extending analysis scope without adding time.

items.title: reasoning + tool
items.desc: ai as amplifier, not substitute. each project explicitly documents what was generated and what was thought — transparency as practice.

items.title: analytics engineering reference
items.desc: technical knowledge base built during badge preparation — 7 domains, 22 files, glossary with 60+ terms of active technical vocabulary.

items.title: financial analysis
items.desc: indicators dashboard with decision-oriented storytelling for business stakeholders at itaú. interactive visualizations with quicksight.

about.label: 05 — about
about.title: the person behind the data
about.text:
analytics engineer jr. at itaú unibanco, building data systems that turn volume into clarity.

i believe the difference between good data and a good decision is the reasoning in between — and that ai is the tool that extends that reasoning, not replaces it.

this portfolio is evidence of that.
